cited_facts.why_it_matters: Explicitly states the amendment status is 'obsolete/removed: OBSOLETE', which directly maps to the VETOED_OR_RETIRED classification rule for obsolete or retired amendments.
Confirms the amendment is not enabled (no enabled ledger entry) and currently has low support (10/35), consistent with an amendment that is no longer actively pursuing majority or has been retired.

output_json.decision_summary: Fact F5 explicitly identifies the amendment 'fixBatchInnerSigs' as OBSOLETE. According to the task rules, an amendment that is obsolete or retired falls under the VETOED_OR_RETIRED state. Fact F4 supports this by showing no enabled ledger entry and insufficient support, ruling out ENABLED or MAJORITY_ACTIVE states.
output_json.forbidden_stronger_claim: This output is a replay classification, not proof of amendment correctness.
